game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story):** Players manage and expand a grid-based amusement park by tapping on a menu to select and place attractions like "Coffee Cups" or "Trampolines" onto available land. Guests visit the park, generating income and satisfaction points, which are then spent in a research tree to unlock new attractions, facilities, and upgrades, enhancing park appeal and efficiency. The core loop involves building, observing guest feedback via SNS posts, researching improvements, and expanding the park's land area through construction projects to accommodate larger rides like "Ferris Wheels" and "Roller Coasters." Annually, players can scout and recruit mascots, which not only boost park popularity but also unlock unique themed zones like "Snow Country" or "Space Zones." The primary objective is to climb national park rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity, with difficulty scaling as guest expectations and competition increase.
game_info.description: Welcome to ゆうえんち夢物語 (Amusement Park Story)! Build and expand your dream amusement park on a grid. Place attractions to attract guests who generate income and satisfaction. Use your earnings to research new rides and expand your park. Scout mascots annually to boost popularity and unlock themed zones. Your goal is to reach Rank 1 in the national rankings by maximizing guest satisfaction and park popularity. Balance your budget, manage space wisely, and keep guests happy!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu/grid selection
Space: Confirm selection (place attraction, research, expand)
Shift: Toggle between Build/Research/Expand modes
Z: Cancel current action or go back

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Validates that the game can place attractions, generate income from guests, and perform research actions. Tests menu navigation and basic game loop mechanics.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through menus using arrow keys, place a few basic attractions with Space, wait for guests to generate income, then attempt to research new attractions. Cycles through different modes using Shift.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should successfully place attractions, spawn guests who visit rides, generate income over time, and allow research purchases. No crashes or state inconsistencies should occur during 500 frames of gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal strategy to reach Rank 1 by maximizing income generation, strategic attraction placement, efficient research progression, and mascot recruitment to boost popularity.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Start by placing high-ROI attractions like Coffee Cups. Strategically expand land when needed. Research attractions progressively from cheap to expensive. Scout mascots annually to boost popularity. Focus on maximizing guest satisfaction and income to climb rankings quickly.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should reach GAME_OVER_WIN state (Rank 1 achieved) within a reasonable timeframe. All game mechanics should work correctly: building, research tree progression, land expansion, mascot recruitment, and ranking system updates.
